headline: Jacobs awarded EPCM contract to deliver second Hut 8 AI data center in Texas
summary: DALLAS, May 12, 2026--Jacobs awarded a sole‑source EPCM contract by Hut 8, an energy infrastructure platform, to deliver a second U.S. AI data center campus.

headline: Jacobs Wins Nashville Mobility Contract As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) has been awarded a multi-year contract to deliver architecture and engineering services for Nashville’s citywide mobility initiative. The contract covers planning, engineering, environmental, and technology work to support the city’s broader transportation and mobility goals. Nashville’s Department of Transportation and Multimodal Infrastructure selected Jacobs to support a long-term urban mobility transformation program. For investors following infrastructure and...
